Package com.github.scribejava.oidc

Class OidcService

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.github.scribejava.core.oauth.OAuthService
      • com.github.scribejava.core.oauth.OAuth20Service
        • com.github.scribejava.oidc.OidcService
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    OAuth20AsyncOperations, OAuth20Operations, Closeable, AutoCloseable
    public class OidcService
extends OAuth20Service
    Service OIDC natif.
